testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 1 code style errors / warnings: ./examples_rclpy_minimal_subscriber/subscriber_old_school.py:23:5: F824 `global g_node` is unused: name is never assigned in scope assert 1 == 0
